sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101517" key="su/sxesis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύσχεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n101517.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">detention, imprisonment</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:292:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">292.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
